function.rulebook_notes: Resolved informal relationship term via canonical cast record, then identified project involvement through structured linked entity identifier and read each matched project README before answering.
function.outcome_justification: 10_entities/cast/oskar.md is the canonical record with relationship `son` and alias `oskar`. Returned the exact README titles sorted alphabetically.
